程序包的使用
edu.bupt.ta.model

使用edu.bupt.ta.model的程序包
程序包
说明
edu.bupt.ta.model
 
edu.bupt.ta.service
 
edu.bupt.ta.storage
 
  • edu.bupt.ta.model使用的edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting.
    ApplicationStatus
    Possible states of a TA's job application.
    JobStatus
    Possible states of a job posting.
    UserRole
    User roles in the TA Recruitment System.
  • edu.bupt.ta.service使用的edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting.
    ApplicationStatus
    Possible states of a TA's job application.
    Job
    Represents a job posting in the TA Recruitment System.
    SystemLog
    Represents an entry in the system audit log.
    User
    Represents a user account in the TA Recruitment System.
  • edu.bupt.ta.storage使用的edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting.
    Job
    Represents a job posting in the TA Recruitment System.
    User
    Represents a user account in the TA Recruitment System.
